THE TOLERANCE ON ANCHOR SPACING SHALL BE +6.
MENTIONED IN' TABLE 2. HOWEVER, THE

6. DETAILS OF CORRUCATED V & Y LUG SHALL BE

UON IN ARRANGEMENT DRAWINGS.
7. MINOR VARIATION IN SPACING MAY BE REQUIRED AT
OPENINGS, TERMINATIONS ETC. HOWEVER NO OF
ANCHORS PER SQ. METER SHALL BE WITHIN THE LIMIT
MENTIONED.
8. SS—ANCHORS SHALL BE SUPPLIED IN SOLUTION
ANNEALED CONDITION.
9. PROVIDE PLASTIC CAP ON ANCHOR TIPS (13mm LONG &
3mm THK.).
